title: Sort with ORDER BY
instruction:
`ORDER BY` sorts rows. Default is ascending (`ASC`). Use `DESC` to reverse.

Run this.
successMessage: `ORDER BY score DESC` ranks highest to lowest. Swap to `ASC` (or remove `DESC`) for lowest to highest.

title: LIMIT — top N rows
instruction:
`LIMIT` caps the number of returned rows. Combined with `ORDER BY`, it retrieves the top N.

Run this.
successMessage: Top 3 most expensive products. `ORDER BY DESC` then `LIMIT 3` is the standard pattern for leaderboards and rankings.

title: OFFSET — pagination
instruction:
`OFFSET` skips rows before returning results. Combined with `LIMIT`, this implements pagination.

Run this.
successMessage: `LIMIT 2 OFFSET 2` skips the first 2 rows and returns the next 2. Page N = `LIMIT size OFFSET (N-1)*size`.
